\begin{frame}{The problem: decoding is slow}
  \begin{alertblock}{Cost}
    \begin{itemize}
      \item Latency grows with context
      \item Dense attention dominates the budget (50\% \& more)
    \end{itemize}
  \end{alertblock}
\end{frame}
\note{Open with the latency pain point.}

\begin{frame}{Method: sparse attention routing}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Route each token to k heads; skip the rest
  \end{itemize}

\begin{frame}{Results}
  \begin{exampleblock}{Headline numbers}
    \begin{itemize}
      \item +3.2 BLEU over baseline

\statementframe{Route attention sparsely; keep the quality, drop the cost.}
